taskPreset.title: Create OpenSpec Spec Compress Task
taskPreset.description: Queue a structured OpenSpec spec compression cleanup task with documented guardrails and non-interactive defaults.

panel.projectHint: The OpenSpec compression task will be created in the selected project.
panel.taskNameHint: Optional. Leave empty to let the title be optimized asynchronously after dispatch.
panel.taskNamePlaceholder: Compress active OpenSpec specs without touching active changes
panel.repositoryAccessHint: Optionally select read/write repositories that provide nearby implementation context. OpenSpec asset writes remain constrained by the preset workflow.
panel.repositoryAccessEmpty: No repositories are available for the selected project yet.
panel.commandHint: Pick the built-in compression workflow command.
panel.briefHint: Describe what should be compressed, any capability priorities, and any boundaries that must be preserved.
panel.briefPlaceholder: Compress stale specs under openspec/specs, flatten delta headers, archive retired capabilities with git mv, preserve active requirements, and do not modify openspec/changes.

compress-specs.description: Compress and normalize OpenSpec specs under openspec/specs while preserving active requirements and active change proposals.
